title: rubus rhytidophyllus
intro: Rubus rhytidophyllus, also known as the rough-leaved bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The leaves and roots of Rubus rhytidophyllus have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus rhytidophyllus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rubus rhytidophyllus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
